FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class DropDownButton

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI DropDownButton: a standard Button with a trailing chevron that opens a MenuFlyout of choices below it on click. WinUI's DropDownButton derives from Button, so it IS the Button template (RootGrid background/border/corner + an 83ms BrushTransition) plus a 2-column grid — content (*) and a 12×12 chevron AnimatedIcon (Auto, Margin 8,0,0,0). The chevron foreground is DropDownButtonForegroundSecondary (TextFillColorSecondaryBrush; Tertiary on hover/press, the disabled foreground when disabled); its FontIcon fallback is glyph  at FontSize 8.

Open/close goes through the overlay popup service (Service): re-click toggles, Escape / click-outside light-dismiss, and focus is captured on open + restored on close (host-wired). Keyboard: Enter/Space (the engine's focused- clickable activation) and Down open the flyout. The overlay raises the WinUI ExpandCollapse semantics (Collapsed↔Expanded); IsEnabled gates all interaction via the engine and swaps the resting fill/border/foreground to the disabled tokens. The chevron itself does NOT rotate on open — matching WinUI's AnimatedChevronDownSmall, whose only states are Normal/PointerOver/Pressed (no Expanded state). See the deferral note in the control's design comments. 

public sealed class DropDownButton : Component

Field Value

PartChevron

The trailing 12×12 chevron box (the WinUI AnimatedIcon column). Owned: none.

public const string PartChevron = "Chevron"

Field Value

string

PartIcon

The optional leading 14px glyph — a TextEl (mounted only when Glyph is set); customize via Parts.Set<TextEl>(DropDownButton.PartIcon, …). Owned: none.

public const string PartIcon = "Icon"

Field Value

string

PartLabel

The label run — a TextEl; customize via Parts.Set<TextEl>(DropDownButton.PartLabel, …). Owned: none (the foreground ramp is state-driven and a modifier may override it).

public const string PartLabel = "Label"

Field Value

string

PartRoot

The button chrome (the WinUI RootGrid). Owned: OnClick (the flyout toggle), OnKeyDown (Down/F4 open chords), OnRealized (anchor capture, chained), Role, Children.

public const string PartRoot = "Root"

Field Value

string

Parts

Lightweight per-part styling (CSS ::part): modifiers keyed by the PartXxx consts; see TemplateParts for the contract.

public TemplateParts? Parts

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
